notes: This project is a Next.js static site with no HTTP API endpoints. The scripts/cleanup-orchestrator.js is a CLI tool tested via Vitest unit tests (tests/cleanup-orchestrator.test.ts). Postman collections are not applicable for this project architecture.

testingApproach.cliScripts: Tested via Vitest unit tests in tests/ directory
testingApproach.staticSite: Tested via build validation and browser testing
testingApproach.deployment: Tested via AWS S3 + CloudFront deployment scripts
